name: MARKER THERAPEUT.  DL-,01
summary: Marker Therapeutics Inc. is a clinical-stage immuno-oncology company specializing in the development of novel T cell-based immunotherapies for the treatment of hematological malignancies and solid tumors. The company is developing multi-tumor associated antigen (multiTAA)-specific T cell therapies. Marker Therapeutics Inc. is headquartered in Houston, Texas.
